extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard attacked solo inside final 2km on sustained uphill finish, held off disorganized chase led by ULISSI for stage win and yellow jersey.
tactical_patterns: Ineos isolated CARAPAZ by letting Deceuninck-QuickStep/Bora burn matches chasing HAAS, enabling late GC rider attack on uphill sprint finish.
ULISSI Diego led chase but launched too early on sustained uphill gradient, burning sprinters before CARAPAZ could be caught.
Yellow jersey PEDERSEN completely dropped on final circuits suggests GC contenders should position aggressively even on semi-sprint finishes with climbing.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: Won from solo attack inside 2km against sprinters on uphill finish, revealing tactical opportunism beyond pure GC riding
rider_signals.HAAS Nathan: negative: Burned 2.5-year winless streak attempting solo from 2 laps out, mistimed effort against organized trade teams
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: negative: First to chase CARAPAZ but exploded immediately, suggests poor form or positioning error for uphill sprint finish
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: Yellow jersey completely distanced on final technical circuits, exposed weakness in positioning or climbing on hybrid finishes
rider_signals.KELDERMANN Bauke: positive: Finished third mixing with sprinters on uphill finish, unexpected sprint capacity for pure GC rider
